case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. vs. PETERS, EDDRENA D et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERS, EDDRENA D $4,426.60 PRINCIPAL, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $268.94 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,585.54
